section_name: Improper representation of a diesel inspection station

subsections.text: The executive director shall have the authority to suspend or revoke the diesel inspection license and unused certification of diesel emissions control forms held by a licensed inspection station for the following reasons:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The station is not equipped as required;

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The station is not operating from a location for which licensure was granted;

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The licensed location has been altered so that it no longer qualifies as a diesel inspection station;

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: Diesel inspections are not being performed with applicable laws, rules, or regulations of the commission or the executive director.

The executive director shall also have authority to suspend or revoke the license of a diesel emissions inspector and require surrender of such license when the executive director determines that the inspector is not qualified to perform the diesel inspection or when inspections do not comply with applicable laws and the rules and regulations of the executive director or commission.
